_note: D3.C.2 failure-mode example #3 — legacy UK office refurbishment with 50W halogen downlights (750 lm, 15 lm/W lamp efficacy). is_uk_new_build=true because major refurbishment triggers Part L 2021 §6. Lamp efficacy 15 lm/W ≪ 95 lm/W target → INV-6 FAIL critical. Plus no daylight-linking despite glazed W wall + no occupancy detection → INV-6 sub-checks 2+3 also FAIL. INV-10 composite FAIL. INV-1 still PASSes (343 lux ≥ 300) because the engineer over-provisioned fittings to compensate for halogen's low efficacy.

luminaire.type: 50W GU10 halogen recessed downlight — legacy refurbishment

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 50W GU10 halogen downlight, 2800K, 36-degree beam (legacy retrofit demo for uk-part-l-fail-incandescent). 15 lm/W efficacy, fails Approved Doc L 2021 §6 Table 6.2 95 lm/W minimum. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
